summary: Overrides | Playback | Validate Playback Overrides Table
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Overrides" tile
Then the user should be navigated to the "Overrides" page
And the "Session" tab should be selected by default
When the user clicks on the "Playback" tab
Then the user should see the "Playback" overrides table
And the table should have the columns:
ID | Okta Id | Client Type | Experience | Features | Actions
And the user should see the "Create Override" button
And the user should see a search bar with a "View" button

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "Overrides" tile
steps.result:
*Then* the user should be navigated to the "Overrides" page

*And* the "Session" tab should be selected by default

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "Playback" tab
steps.result:
*Then* the user should see the "Playback" overrides table

And the table should have the columns:
ID | Okta Id | Client Type | Experience | Features | Actions

*And* the user should see the "Create Override" button

*And* the user should see a search bar with a "View" button
